power_yoga.name: Free Trial
power_yoga.description: Experience a full Power Yoga session before committing
power_yoga.ideal_for: An energising practice to build strength, enhance endurance, and support healthy weight management.
what_to_expect: A 50-minute guided high-energy yoga flow
Strength-building sequences with dynamic movements
Focus on balance, stability, and core engagement
Breath coordination to enhance endurance and support weight management

power_yoga.name: Monthly Plan
power_yoga.description: 5 sessions per week of dynamic Power Yoga
power_yoga.ideal_for: An energising practice to build strength, enhance endurance, and support healthy weight management.

Strength-building sequences with dynamic movements
Focus on balance, stability, and core engagement
Breath coordination to enhance endurance and support weight management

morning_yoga.name: Free Trial
morning_yoga.description: Start your morning with a single guided yoga session
morning_yoga.ideal_for: A mindful start to the day, blending yoga practice, pranayama, and wisdom to cultivate it as a way of life.
what_to_expect: A 45-minute guided session to gently awaken the body
Simple asanas combined with breath awareness and pranayama
Introduction to yogic concepts for daily life
A calm and balanced flow to set the tone for the day

morning_yoga.description: Daily morning yoga to energise your every day

beginner_yoga.name: Free Trial
beginner_yoga.description: Try your very first yoga class in a safe, welcoming environment
beginner_yoga.ideal_for: A gentle introduction to yoga, designed to build a strong and mindful foundation for your practice.
what_to_expect: A 50-minute guided session with simple and easy-to-follow asanas
Focus on correct alignment and body awareness
Introduction to basic pranayama and breath coordination
A supportive pace to build confidence and comfort in practice

beginner_yoga.name: Monthly Plan
beginner_yoga.description: Structured beginner programme — 5 sessions per week

kids_yoga.name: Free Trial
kids_yoga.description: Let your child experience yoga in a fun, playful setting
kids_yoga.ideal_for: A fun and mindful practice designed to support focus, flexibility, and overall well-being in children.
what_to_expect: A 45-minute engaging session with playful yoga movements
Simple asanas to improve flexibility and body awareness
Breathing practices to enhance focus and calmness
Gentle movement to support healthy activity levels and address lifestyle concerns like low activity and childhood obesity

hatha_yoga.name: Free Trial
hatha_yoga.description: Experience classical Hatha Yoga in its authentic form
hatha_yoga.ideal_for: A classical practice that brings balance to body and mind through posture, breath, and stillness.
what_to_expect: A 50-minute guided session rooted in traditional Hatha Yoga
Steady and mindful asanas with focus on alignment
Integration of pranayama for breath awareness and balance
A calm pace to cultivate stability, awareness, and inner stillness

hatha_yoga.description: Classical Hatha practice 5 times a week

Integration of pranayama for breath awareness and balance

default.name: Free Trial
default.description: Try a single session before enrolling
default.ideal_for: Anyone curious about yoga who wants to experience the practice before committing to a plan
what_to_expect: A 60-minute guided session with the instructor
Introduction to breath work and foundational postures
Personalised feedback at the end of the session
Guidance on which ongoing class best suits you

default.name: Monthly Plan
default.ideal_for: Students ready to build a consistent daily practice across all formats and levels
what_to_expect: Unlimited access to all group classes every day
Weekly progress check-ins with the instructor
Access to our private student community
Flexible scheduling — attend any time slot that works for you

default.name: Advanced Yoga
default.ideal_for: Dedicated practitioners seeking deep, personalised guidance and accelerated growth
what_to_expect: One-on-one sessions tailored to your specific goals and body
Customised asana sequences and pranayama routines
Access to all group classes in addition to personal sessions
Detailed progress tracking and monthly practice review
